app_lock_content: Keep your notes safe and private with passcode protection.
auto_unlock_desc: Automatically unlock after entering the correct password.
backup_desc_imp: Are you sure you want to backup now?
backup_error: An error occurred while backing up notes
backup_important: Important: Each new backup will overwrite the previous on Google Drive.
check_connection: Please check your internet connection and try again.

cloud_backup.content: Easily back up and restore your notes to Google Drive or your device.
cloud_backup.restore_desc: Restore notes from the last cloud backup.
cloud_backup.settings_desc: Keep your notes sync with Google Drive. Notes and media are securely stored with encryption.
cloud_backup.title: Cloud Backup

create_pass_card_content: Secure your notes by setting a passcode. You can use this passcode to unlock the app and access your notes. Please note that if you forget your passcode, you may lose access to your notes.
create_pass_card_title: Create a passcode to protect your notes
delete_account_desc: Deleting your account will remove your data from our server. This action will not affect any backups you may have made locally or in Google Drive.
delete_all_notes_desc: Are you sure you want to delete all notes?
delete_folder_desc: All notes and subfolders will be deleted

delete_notes_desc.one: This note will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete_notes_desc.other: These {} notes will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

delete_selected_notes_desc: Are you sure you want to delete selected notes?
deleted_notes_moved: Deleted notes are moved to the Recently Deleted
deleted_notes_moved_desc: You can recover or permanently delete from Recently Deleted Notes
enter_folder_name: Enter a name for this folder
enter_verify_code_content: Please enter the verification code sent to {}.
feature2_desc: Sort the notes as you wish. View notes by date ranges.
feature3_desc: Add multiple images to your notes at once.
feature4_desc: Quickly undo or restore your latest changes to the note
incorrect_pass_desc: The password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
invalid_code: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
invalid_mail: Invalid email address. Please enter a valid email.
invalid_markdown_document_desc: Please provide a valid markdown document.
local_backup_desc: Securely backup your notes and media on your device.
lock_desc: Lock your app with a passcode

move_to_trash.one: {} note will be moved to the trash.
move_to_trash.other: {} notes will be moved to the trash.

name: Name
name_taken: Folder exists. Please choose a different name.

Please wait before requesting a new code.

powerful_note_taking.content: Enhance your notes with advanced text formatting options, embed images, create to-do lists right inside your notes.
powerful_note_taking.title: Powerful note taking

premium_notes_experience.content: Experience clean and minimalistic iOS styled interface.
premium_notes_experience.title: Premium notes experience

protect_your_notes_desc: Lock your app with a passcode to keep your notes private.
recently_deleted_desc: You can recover or permanently delete these notes.
recovery_mail_footer: If you forget your password, you can reset it using the recovery email address.
recovery_mail_message: This will allow you to reset your password if you forget it.
remove_passcode_desc: Are you sure you want to remove passcode and disable app lock?
restore_ask: Are you sure you want to restore notes from cloud backup?
restore_error: An error occurred while restoring notes
restore_success_desc: Your backup has been successfully restored.
scandoc_desc: Scan documents with your camera, adjust cropping and colors, then easily share or save them.
set_password_desc1: Set a password for your app and keep your notes safe

settings.auto_save_desc: Automatically save your notes as you type

sign_out_desc: Are you sure you want to sign out?
